title: A comparative study of the in vitro permeation of ibuprofen in mammalian skin, the PAMPA model and silicone membrane.
source_label_space: IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel)
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PEG 300 solution
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PG solution
IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel)
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray
IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel)
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray
IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel) – 3 µL dose PAMPA
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray – 3 µL dose PAMPA
IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel) – 1 µL dose PAMPA
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray – 1 µL dose PAMPA
IBUGEL (Ibuprofen 5% w/w gel) – 30 µL dose PAMPA
IBULEVE Speed Relief 5% Spray – 30 µL dose PAMPA
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PEG 300 solution – 30 µL dose PAMPA
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PG solution – 30 µL dose PAMPA
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PEG 300 solution – silicone
Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PG solution – silicone
notes: Green triangle series is clearly the highest curve at 48 h, reaching approximately 38–39 µg/cm². Grounded to PG (Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PG solution) per page text legend order and FIGURE_LABEL_SPACE.

raw_response.axis_summary: X-axis: Time (h), range 0–48; Y-axis: Cumulative amount (µg/cm²), range 0–50
raw_response.legend_summary: Four visually distinct series identified by marker shape/color: green triangle (PG), purple/blue circle (IBULEVE or PEG 300), blue diamond (PEG 300 or IBULEVE), red square (IBUGEL). Page text confirms legend order: IBUGEL (square), IBULEVE (circle), PG (triangle), PEG 300 (diamond).

readings.notes: Green triangle series is clearly the highest curve at 48 h, reaching approximately 38–39 µg/cm². Grounded to PG (Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PG solution) per page text legend order and FIGURE_LABEL_SPACE.
Purple/blue circle series reaches approximately 16 µg/cm² at 48 h. Grounded to IBULEVE per page text. Overlaps closely with diamond series making precise distinction moderately uncertain.

Blue diamond series nearly overlaps with the circle series at 48 h, both reading approximately 15–17 µg/cm². Grounded to PEG 300 (Ibuprofen 5% w/w in IPA/PEG 300 solution) per page text. Low confidence due to overlap with IBULEVE series.
Red square series is the lowest of the four at 48 h, reading approximately 10–11 µg/cm². Grounded to IBUGEL per page text legend order.
